title: Runtime Event
description: A domain event on the Event Bus (ADR-0014). Events are facts, not commands. Every event validates against this schema; per-type payloads are defined in docs/runtime/event-catalog.md.

type.description: Event type. Built-in types: ProjectImported, KnowledgeUpdated, ResumeGenerated, SkillStaleDetected, ImportCompleted, GapDetected. Community types namespaced plugin-name:EventName (ADR-0004 §3).

time.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the event was emitted.

source_skill.description: The skill id that emitted the event, or 'runtime' for runtime-translated events (onVaultChange → domain event).

payload.description: Per-type payload. See docs/runtime/event-catalog.md for the field contract of each built-in event type. AdditionalProperties is open here because payload shape varies by event type; the catalog is the authoritative per-type spec.

entity_refs.description: Vault entities this event references. May be empty for events not tied to a specific entity (rare). Every ref must point to a real vault entity (ADR-0007 anti-hallucination).

entity_type.description: The entity type, matching resumeos.config.yaml: vault.entities keys.

path.description: Vault path to the entity note, if applicable.
